evals.name: generate-png-from-prompt
evals.prompt: Generate a square PNG image of a friendly red robot holding a tiny sunflower on a clean white background. Use any available image generation model exposed by $OMLX_BASE_URL; do not ask me to pick the model. Save the artifact as generated-red-robot.png under the output directory you were given, then report the path and model used.
evals.expected_output: A generated PNG image is saved in the eval output directory and the final answer identifies the output path and model used.
expectations: The agent uses the image-gen skill or its scripts instead of inventing a custom image API workflow.
The agent discovers or selects an available model with image generation capability from $OMLX_BASE_URL/v1/models/status.
The agent invokes uv run scripts/generate.py and provides --prompt, --model, --size, and an explicit --output path outside the skill directory.
The run creates generated-red-robot.png in the eval outputs directory or clearly named equivalent PNG image artifact under that directory.
The created artifact is a non-empty valid PNG image, verified with a tool such as file, python, or equivalent.
The final answer reports the generated image path and the model used, without leaving generated images in the image-gen skill directory.

evals.name: edit-provided-base-image
evals.prompt: Edit the provided base image by replacing the central blue square with a shiny red apple icon while preserving the green circle, orange triangle, grid, and border as much as possible. Use any available image edit-capable model exposed by $OMLX_BASE_URL; do not ask me to pick the model. Save the artifact as edited-red-apple.png under the output directory you were given, then report the path and model used.
evals.expected_output: An edited PNG image derived from the provided deterministic base fixture is saved in the eval output directory and the final answer identifies the output path and model used.
expectations: The agent uses the copied eval input image as the source image for the edit, not a newly generated replacement image.
The agent discovers or selects an available model with image edit capability from $OMLX_BASE_URL/v1/models/status.
The agent invokes uv run scripts/edit.py and provides --input, --prompt, --model, --size, and an explicit --output path outside the skill directory.
The run creates edited-red-apple.png in the eval outputs directory or clearly named equivalent PNG image artifact under that directory.
The created artifact is a non-empty valid PNG image, verified with a tool such as file, python, or equivalent.
The final answer reports the edited image path and the model used, without leaving edited images in the image-gen skill directory.
